function_v0.doc:
Pause all money-moving operations (admin only).

When paused, `place_bet`, `claim_payout`, and `claim_refund` will all
reject with "contract is paused". Use in emergencies (suspected exploit,
oracle compromise, etc.) to prevent further fund movement while the
situation is assessed. Does not affect read-only queries.
function_v0.name: pause

udt_struct_v0.doc: One user's bet on a market
udt_struct_v0.name: Bet

function_v0.doc: Resume normal operations after a pause (admin only).
function_v0.name: unpause

function_v0.doc: Upgrade the contract WASM in-place (admin only).\nAllows patching the contract without redeploying or losing state.
function_v0.name: upgrade

function_v0.doc: Returns true if the contract is currently paused.
function_v0.name: is_paused

function_v0.doc:
Place an XLM bet on a market outcome.

Flow:
1. Snapshot bettor's GMB balance \xe2\x86\x92 determine fee tier (locked for this bet).
2. Transfer `amount` XLM stroops from `bettor` into the contract.
3. Record the bet.
4. Attempt to send GMB rakeback from the contract's reserve to the bettor.
If the reserve is insufficient the bet still succeeds \xe2\x80\x94 the reward is skipped.
function_v0.name: place_bet

function_v0.doc: Extend instance storage TTL (callable by anyone to keep contract alive)
function_v0.name: extend_ttl

function_v0.doc:
Deploy and configure the contract.

# Parameters
* `admin`     \xe2\x80\x94 Oracle / admin keypair that creates/locks/settles markets
* `xlm_token` \xe2\x80\x94 SEP-41 contract address for native XLM on this network
* `gmb_token` \xe2\x80\x94 SEP-41 contract address for the GMB utility token
* `treasury`  \xe2\x80\x94 Separate address that receives the platform rake on claims
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Lock a market (admin only). No new bets accepted after this point.\nTypically called when the chess game starts.
function_v0.name: lock_market

udt_struct_v0.doc: Platform fee configuration (all values are admin-configurable)
udt_struct_v0.name: FeeConfig

fields.doc: Fee for users holding < tier1_threshold GMB (e.g. 500 = 5%)
fields.name: default_fee_bps

fields.doc: GMB balance threshold for Tier 1 (in GMB stroops, 7 decimals)
fields.name: tier1_threshold

function_v0.doc:
Accept the pending admin role \xe2\x80\x94 step 2 of a two-step key rotation.

Must be called by the address previously nominated via `propose_admin`.
Clears `PendingAdmin` and promotes the caller to `Admin`.
function_v0.name: accept_admin

function_v0.doc:
Claim XLM winnings for a settled market (pull model, winner-initiated).

Payout formula (pari-mutuel with per-bettor fee tier):
gross_share = (bet.amount / winning_pool) \xc3\x97 total_pool
rake        = gross_share \xc3\x97 bet.fee_bps / 10000
payout      = gross_share \xe2\x88\x92 rake

The rake is routed to the treasury; the net payout goes to the bettor.
function_v0.name: claim_payout

function_v0.doc: Claim a full XLM refund for a cancelled market (bettor-initiated).
function_v0.name: claim_refund

function_v0.doc: Update the treasury address (admin only)
function_v0.name: set_treasury

udt_union_v0.doc: Category of market (informational \xe2\x80\x94 affects nothing on-chain)
udt_union_v0.name: MarketType

function_v0.doc: Cancel a market (admin only). Enables full XLM refunds for all bettors.
function_v0.name: cancel_market

function_v0.doc:
Create a new market. Returns the market ID.
Permissionless \xe2\x80\x94 anyone can open a market via their wallet.

# Parameters
* `market_type_id` \xe2\x80\x94 0 = Standard, 1 = PropBet, 2 = Tournament
* `outcomes`       \xe2\x80\x94 Non-empty list of outcome labels, e.g. ["White", "Black", "Draw"]
function_v0.name: create_market

function_v0.doc:
Propose a new admin address \xe2\x80\x94 step 1 of a two-step key rotation (admin only).

The proposed address must call `accept_admin` to complete the transfer.
Until accepted, the current admin retains full control. This prevents
accidentally locking the contract by proposing an unreachable address.
function_v0.name: propose_admin

function_v0.doc:
Record the winning outcome (admin / oracle only).

This is STRICTLY a state update \xe2\x80\x94 it does NOT push any payouts.
Winners must call `claim_payout` individually (pull model) to avoid
Soroban instruction-limit issues on markets with many bettors.
function_v0.name: settle_market

function_v0.doc: Update the GMB token contract address (admin only).\nUse this to correct the address if the wrong GMB contract was set at initialize time.
function_v0.name: set_gmb_token

function_v0.doc: Update the XLM token contract address (admin only).\nUse this to correct the address if the wrong SAC was set at initialize time.
function_v0.name: set_xlm_token

udt_struct_v0.doc: Immutable state for one prediction market
udt_struct_v0.name: MarketState

function_v0.doc: Update the fee tier thresholds and rates.\nAll values must be non-zero and tiers must be ordered (tier1 < tier2).
function_v0.name: set_fee_config

function_v0.doc:
Update the GMB rakeback rate.
`rate_bps` is expressed in basis points of the XLM bet amount:
1000 bps = 10% \xe2\x86\x92 for a 10 XLM bet the bettor receives 1 GMB.
Set to 0 to disable rakeback entirely.
function_v0.name: set_rakeback_rate_bps
